provider.faq1Question: How do I create a new deal?
provider.faq1Answer: Go to the Deals tab and tap the "+" button. Fill in the deal details, set a discount, and publish.
provider.faq2Question: How does QR code redemption work?
provider.faq2Answer: Customers claim deals and receive a QR code. Use the Scan QR tab to scan their code and redeem the deal.
provider.faq3Question: Can I pause or delete a deal?
provider.faq3Answer: Yes! Go to My Deals, tap on a deal, and use the Pause or Delete options.
provider.faq4Question: How do I respond to reviews?
provider.faq4Answer: Go to the Reviews tab. You can reply to any customer review directly from there.
provider.faq5Question: How do I change my business information?
provider.faq5Answer: Go to Profile > Business Information. You can edit your name, description, contact details, and upload photos.
